case_title: VALERIE NELSON VS. EDMOND BEDROSSIAN et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$46.00) SERVED NOV-09-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BEDROSSIAN, EDMOND
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHAEL MAU. FILED BY NELSON, VALERIE BEDROSSIAN, EDMOND BEDROSSIAN, JASMINE GEBRON, BOB HILL & CO PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$46.00) SERVED NOV-09-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HILL & CO PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$46.00) SERVED OCT-10-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GEBRON, BOB
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$46.00) SERVED OCT-10-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BEDROSSIAN, JASMINE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-11-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,334.03 FILED BY NELSON, VALERIE AS TO DEFENDANT BEDROSSIAN, EDMOND BEDROSSIAN, JASMINE GEBRON, BOB HILL & CO PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NELSON, VALERIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BEDROSSIAN, EDMOND BEDROSSIAN, JASMINE GEBRON, BOB HILL & CO PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. JUDGMENT FOR THE DEFENDANT. SECURITY DEPOSIT DEDUCTIONS WERE PROPER UNDER LEASE TERMS, AND THERE WAS NO EVIDENCE OF ANY BAD FAITH BY THE LANDLORD, GIVEN THAT PLAINTIFF BREACHED ONE YEAR LEASE AND LEFT EARLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF NELSON, VALERIE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2012 - JUDGMENT.
